name: maya-c2-full-arc
walkthrough_voiceover: I made a story for my five-year-old. A minute later, I was reading the opening on my phone, free. I cried before I finished it. So I bought the full fifteen minutes. Twenty four ninety nine. The next night I played it for her. The hero, of course... was Maya.

end_card.headline: A story that knows their name.
end_card.subline: Read the opening free · £24.99 if you love it
